lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- My Free Time -- like + verb-ing
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Estephano Akihito Ishii | Aula 7 -- My Free Time

listenings.text: Hi, I am Bruno. Let me tell you about my free time. After work, I like playing games on my computer. On weekends, I love watching movies with my family. I do not like cooking, so my brother cooks for me. On Sunday morning, I like running in the park near my house. Running makes me happy. At night, I like reading a good book before I sleep. I have a lot of fun in my free time.

Hello, my name is Carla. I want to tell you about my weekend. On Saturday, I like dancing with my friends. I love music, so dancing is my favorite hobby. I also like drawing. I draw pictures of my city. I do not like running, but I like walking in the park. On Sunday, I like cooking lunch for my family and watching a good movie. My weekend is always fun and busy.

extra_audio.text: Estephano has free time on Saturday. In the morning, he likes playing games. After lunch, he likes watching movies with Sara. In the afternoon, they like running in the park. At night, he likes reading a book.
